case_title: KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC VS SKWIRA ANDREJ DBA ARTISAN PAINTING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC AS TO DEFENDANT SKWIRA ANDREJ DBA ARTISAN PAINTING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKWIRA ANDREJ DBA ARTISAN PAINTING COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,058.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
